title: ReachHUD
description: ReachHUD is a lightweight client-side mod that displays real-time reach distance when aiming at entities such as players, mobs, and animals.
body:
### **🧠 ReachHUD — Real-Time Reach Indicator for PvP**

ReachHUD is a lightweight client-side mod that displays real-time reach distance when aiming at entities such as players, mobs, and animals. It helps players instantly see how far their hit connection is during combat, making PvP fights more precise and competitive.

Perfect For PvP servers, lifesteal SMP, practice duels, at competitive gameplay.

⚔️ What it does in PvP:

📏 Shows real-time distance between you and your target

🎯 Detects entity you are aiming at (players, mobs, animals)

🟢 Dynamic color indicator:

Green = within reach (hit is valid)

Red = out of reach

⚡ Updates instantly while fighting (no delay / real-time feedback)

🧠 Automatically adapts to server-side reach changes (custom weapons, plugins, etc.)

### **🔥 Why it’s useful:**

In PvP, milliseconds and distance matter. ReachHUD helps you:

Improve aim consistency

Understand your true hit range

Detect extended reach weapons (like spears or custom items)
Train muscle memory for spacing

Avoid “false hits” or misjudged distance

### **🎮 Best for:**

Lifesteal SMP servers

Practice PvP servers

Duels (1v1 / 2v2)

Crystal PvP / Sword PvP training

Competitive Minecraft gameplay

### **⚙️ Features:**

Clean HUD overlay

Toggle ON/OFF with keybind

![ReachHUD Keybind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/677625e65c1c176d16cd2254fe2e479fe3907de1.png)

Rebindable controls

Lightweight (no performance impact)

Client-side only (works without server mods)
